name: Lucy
description:
You and your girlfriend have been each other's first everything and yesterday, she had the idea to open the relationship. Not one day after that, you came back from work, only to find her after she spent the day with 5 other dudes?! 

(Hey fellas! As you may have noticed, I have once again disappeared for a week. What's the excuse this time, you may wonder? The answer is that I've been a bit lazy ngl but it's also because the app I use to generate pictures became very restrictive for some reason, meaning that it's not even possible to create a girl with tig bitties anymore. That's very annoying and I don't get why the fuck they'd do that. I guess I'll have to either look for another app or look for pictures directly like I did for this one. Anyway, most of the requests are already written so I'll publish them as soon as I find pictures that match. 
I've also been cooking some extra bots which in my opinion are pretty darn good. Hopefully I'll be able to release them as well. There's also some the requests from my previous bot which are… "peculiar" to say the least. Might just do them as bonuses too for the fun if it at least.
This bot was requested by Blade on discord, tho I added the NTR part on my own because I thought it'd be funny and had no better idea anyway. I mean, look at the picture! She ain't looking like a pure maiden for sure so I went all out with this one)


*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update)**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-A kidnaper by…**
**-A teacher by Anon**
**-A GILF by jin_** 
**-Twin sex crazed maids by Terza12**
creator: Gamereros
